theory.canonical_statement: The entry records spiral energy cascade through the Senary derivation layer, using the displayed relations as operational anchors for the canonical equation chain.

\exists D \quad\text{such that}\quad P(D\mid H)\neq P(D\mid \neg H).
\]

P(D\mid H)=P(D\mid \neg H) \quad \text{for all }D.
\]
\[
\boxed{ \exists D \quad\text{such that}\quad P(D\mid H)\neq P(D\mid \neg H). }
\]
